text.小助手正在待命_随时为你生成暖心弹幕: Assistant is on standby, ready to generate cozy danmu anytime~
text.每次_生成弹幕_至_停止弹幕_为一轮_保存在本机配置库_重启后仍可查看最近_10: Each Start danmu to Stop danmu is one session; last 100 saved locally across restarts
text.暂无记录_停止弹幕后会在此显示时间与_Token_用量: No records yet; stop danmu to see time and token usage here

placeholder.描述本次你要玩的游戏或者直播主题等_以便_AI_更好地生成弹幕_文字尽量在_50: Describe the game or stream topic so AI can generate better danmu; under 50 chars works best
placeholder.请输入你的昵称_AI_可在合适时自然称呼你: Enter your nickname (AI may use it naturally)
